plugin_desc: BlueCat DDI network-service SNMP collection for appliances under BlueCat PEN 13315. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Stable private CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power health scalars are not proven in the current MIB facts, and DNS, DHCP and IPAM counters are business or capacity indicators, so they are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
